title: Formal Access to Information requests that have been responded to within the statutory time limits - Open Government Portal

## Formal Access to Information requests that have been responded to within the statutory time limits
Dataset used to calculate the ratio of formal Access to Information requests that have been responded to within the statutory time limits
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Library and Archives Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Formal Access to Information requests that have been responded to within the statutory time limits CSV English French dataset CSV Explore More information Download
